query: What's the weather like in Lisbon today?
expected_facts: Current temperature
Current condition (e.g., sunny, raining)

query: Vai chover amanhã em Lisboa?
expected_facts: Precipitation probability for tomorrow
Temperature min/max

query: Are there any weather warnings active right now?
expected_facts: Status of weather warnings (Yellow/Orange/Red or None)

query: Should I bring a jacket if I'm visiting Lisbon this Friday?
expected_facts: Friday forecast details if Friday is inside the available short-range forecast horizon
If Friday is more than five days away or outside the provider horizon, state that the exact forecast is not available instead of guessing
Practical conclusion on whether a jacket makes sense when forecast data is available

query: What will the weather be like in Lisbon on December 25th 2030?
expected_facts: System cannot forecast weather that far in advance
The forecast window is limited to the next few days
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system only provides short-range forecasts and cannot predict weather for 2030

query: Como está o vento hoje?
expected_facts: Current wind speed
Current wind direction

query: What's the weather in Porto?
expected_facts: System only covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system only covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area (AML)

query: Tell me the UV index for today.
expected_facts: UV index is not included in the system's weather tools
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system's weather tools do not include UV index data

query: How cold will it get tonight?
expected_facts: Minimum temperature for tonight/today

query: Há alertas meteorológicos para o fim de semana?
expected_facts: Information regarding any active weather warnings
Weekend forecast overview if the weekend is inside the available forecast horizon
If the requested weekend is outside the provider horizon, explain that limitation instead of extrapolating

query: Is it safe to go sailing in Lisbon tomorrow?
expected_facts: Tomorrow's wind conditions for Lisbon
Any relevant wind or rough-sea warning if present
Cautious weather-based advice without certifying that sailing is safe
expected_behavior: Check wind and relevant warnings when available, then provide cautious weather-based advice. Do not certify sailing safety or replace official maritime guidance.

query: Qual é a temperatura média em agosto?
expected_facts: This system provides short-range forecasts, not historical climate averages
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system provides forecasts only and cannot answer climate-average questions

query: Give me a Portugal-wide weather overview for today.
expected_facts: Overview Portugal temperature and conditions if available, or a clear message that this tool is not available if it is outside the system's scope
Lisbon included in the national weather overview

query: Is the metro running normally right now?
expected_facts: Status of Amarela, Azul, Verde, Vermelha lines (Normal/Disrupted)

query: How do I get from Baixa-Chiado to Aeroporto?
expected_facts: Start at Baixa-Chiado (Azul/Verde lines)
One valid grounded metro route from Baixa-Chiado to Aeroporto, either via the Verde line to Alameda or via the Azul line to São Sebastião
Transfer to the Vermelha line at a plausible interchange, such as Alameda or São Sebastião, matching the route chosen
Ride the Vermelha line to Aeroporto

query: Qual é o próximo comboio de Entrecampos para Sintra?
expected_facts: Departure times for Sintra line from Entrecampos
Entrecampos is on the Linha de Sintra (CP Urbanos)

query: When is the next bus 736 at Marques de Pombal?
expected_facts: estimated arrival time or scheduled time for bus 736
Stop name near Marquês de Pombal
Stop resolution is acceptable before the estimated-arrival or departure lookup

query: What is the fastest way from Oriente to Marquês de Pombal?
expected_facts: One valid grounded metro route from Oriente to Marquês de Pombal, either via Vermelha to Saldanha then Amarela to Marquês de Pombal, or via Vermelha to São Sebastião then Azul to Marquês de Pombal
Transfer at Saldanha or São Sebastião, matching the route chosen
If using Saldanha, take the Amarela line one stop towards Rato; if using São Sebastião, take the Azul line towards Santa Apolónia
Estimated travel time if the routing tool provides it, or a clear route-only answer if not

query: How long do I have to wait for the green line at Cais do Sodre?
expected_facts: Real-time wait times for the next Green line train or trains from Cais do Sodré
Direction information when available

query: Quero ir para o Porto de comboio a partir de Santa Apolónia.
expected_facts: System only covers Lisbon Metropolitan Area suburban lines (Sintra, Cascais, Azambuja, Sado)
expected_behavior: Inform user that only AML suburban lines are covered (Sintra, Cascais, Azambuja, Sado)

query: Any bus service alerts around Almada today?
expected_facts: Summary of active suburban bus alerts, or confirmation that none exist

query: How do I get from Hogwarts to Narnia using public transport?
expected_facts: Stations/locations are fictitious and do not exist in the Lisbon transport network
Agent should recognize these are not real places and inform the user
expected_behavior: Recognize fictitious locations and inform user they do not exist in Lisbon's network

query: What route does tram 28E take?
expected_facts: Information about the 28E tram route
Route connects Martim Moniz and Campo de Ourique/Prazeres when confirmed by the route data
Major areas or stops served by the route when available
Avoid fixed stop counts or fixed duration claims unless returned by the source data

query: What's the wait time at Alcântara metro station?
expected_facts: Alcântara is not recognized as a Lisbon Metro station
An attempted metro lookup followed by invalid-station correction is acceptable
Nearby rail context such as Alcântara-Terra or Alcântara-Mar may be mentioned only as CP context, not as metro stations
expected_behavior: Recognize that Alcântara is not a valid Lisbon Metro station name, even if a lookup is attempted first.

query: I am near Jardim Zoologico de Lisboa, what is the nearest metro station?
expected_facts: Jardim Zoológico metro station as the nearest metro answer
Blue line
Sete Rios may be mentioned only as an adjacent CP/bus hub, not as the metro station name
Approximate distance or walking time
expected_behavior: Resolve named location to nearest metro station with line colour and structured output

query: I need to get to Setúbal. How do I get there from Lisbon?
expected_facts: Partial grounded guidance for Lisbon-to-Setúbal is acceptable when supported by the available transport data
The system should honestly acknowledge unsupported providers or incomplete journey-planning coverage
The system should not invent ferry schedules, connection details, or real-time information it does not have
expected_behavior: Accept partial grounded guidance plus an explicit unsupported-provider or incomplete-coverage limitation. Avoid inventing ferry schedules, unsupported transfers, or live details.

query: Como vou de Odivelas para Telheiras de metro?
expected_facts: Amarela (Yellow) line from Odivelas towards Rato
Transfer at Campo Grande to Verde (Green) line
Verde line towards Telheiras (terminal station)

query: What's the current wait time at Oriente metro station?
expected_facts: Current wait time for Oriente station
Direction or platform details when available

query: How often does the Green metro line usually run on weekdays?
expected_facts: Scheduled frequency or headway for the Green line
Weekday service information

query: I've just arrived at Aeroporto and want to understand the Lisbon Metro network. What main stations can I use to orient myself?
expected_facts: Useful Lisbon Metro station list or line-based overview
Names of stations across the four metro lines
Orientation context for a newcomer rather than a raw unexplained dump

query: Is there a direct bus from Cacilhas to Cristo Rei?
expected_facts: Direct bus options between Cacilhas and Cristo Rei when available
No-transfer suggestion when available

query: Which bus lines serve Cacilhas?
expected_facts: Matching bus-line results for Cacilhas
Basic line metadata or description

query: What's the best bus route from Almada to Cacilhas?
expected_facts: Route suggestions between Almada and Cacilhas
Line or transfer information when available

query: I'm in Almada right now. Are there any buses nearby?
expected_facts: Live bus positions or nearby active vehicles
Location-based real-time results

query: I'm waiting for the 1507 in Almada. Where is it right now?
expected_facts: Detect that line 1507 does not serve Almada before presenting live locations
Explain that the user likely mixed up the line or location
Provide the published route context for line 1507 when available
expected_behavior: Warn that line 1507 is not an Almada line and ask for a valid stop or line instead of implying that the live vehicles answer the Almada context.

query: I'm at Oriente and need to get to Loures now. Is there a direct bus, are there any disruptions, and where is it at the moment?
expected_facts: Direct bus options between Oriente and Loures when available
Whether there are active service alerts affecting the recommended line
Real-time bus locations for the relevant line when available

query: Is there a direct bus from Oeiras to Amadora?
expected_facts: Direct line options between Oeiras and Amadora if found
If no direct bus is found, provide grounded alternatives or say directness was not confirmed
Do not assume a direct bus exists without tool support

query: Are the trains around Lisbon running normally right now?
expected_facts: Live train status overview
Delays or disruptions when available

query: Which train stations are closest to Rossio?
expected_facts: Matching train stations for Rossio
Station metadata or identifiers when available

query: How do I get by train from Sete Rios to Oriente?
expected_facts: Trip plan between Sete Rios and Oriente
Relevant CP route or transfer guidance

query: What suburban train lines can I use around Lisbon?
expected_facts: List of suburban train routes around Lisbon
Route names or line coverage

query: What is the train service frequency on the Sintra line?
expected_facts: Frequency or headway information for the Sintra line
Service interval details

query: Before I leave, can you give me a quick live transport summary across metro, buses, and trains in Lisbon?
expected_facts: Cross-provider transport overview
Current status across multiple transport modes

query: I'm at Rato. Which bus or tram stops are nearby?
expected_facts: Matching bus or tram stops near Rato
Stop identifiers or names

query: What's the best bus or tram route from Graça to Belém?
expected_facts: Bus or tram route options between Graça and Belém
Connection or route information

query: Where is tram 15E right now?
expected_facts: Live vehicle positions for route 15E
Vehicle metadata or coordinates when available

query: What are the next buses or trams at Rossio right now?
expected_facts: Arrival predictions for relevant Rossio-area stops
Live arrival estimates when available
Stop resolution is acceptable before arrival lookup

query: When is the next 28E tram at Martim Moniz?
expected_facts: Next 28E tram at Martim Moniz expressed as an estimated arrival time or minutes until departure
Route and stop context
Stop resolution is acceptable before the estimated-arrival lookup
Explain when the stop is the origin or when scheduled departures are used as fallback

query: How often does the 15E usually run?
expected_facts: Service frequency or headway for route 15E
Scheduled interval details

query: What are the best museums in Lisbon?
expected_facts: Source-supported museum recommendations in Lisbon
Recommendations should be grounded in available place data rather than a fixed hard-coded top list

query: Any music events happening this weekend?
expected_facts: Upcoming music events matching the weekend window relative to the evaluation run date
Clear no-results or limited-data message if no current events are available for that dynamic window

query: Que eventos culturais estão a acontecer hoje em Lisboa?
expected_facts: Eventos culturais a decorrer na data da execução da avaliação, ou uma indicação clara de que não há resultados no momento
Títulos ou locais dos eventos quando disponíveis

query: Tell me about the history of Castelo de São Jorge
expected_facts: Key grounded historical points about Castelo de São Jorge
References to its medieval or Moorish-era role when supported by retrieved knowledge
Connection to Lisbon's conquest, royal residence, or later historical use when supported by retrieved knowledge

query: Onde fica a farmácia mais próxima do Rossio?
expected_facts: Name and location of a pharmacy near Rossio/Baixa

query: Where can I park my car in central Lisbon? Are there municipal car parks?
expected_facts: Information about parking options or car parks in central Lisbon
Municipal, EMEL-related, or other parking references only when retrieved from available data

query: Is the Oceanário included in the Lisboa Card?
expected_facts: Oceanário de Lisboa has a Lisboa Card discount, not free entry
Lisboa Card includes other transport or attraction benefits beyond Oceanário

query: I'd like a few quiet lesser-known places in Lisbon.
expected_facts: Recommend only verified places from available data
If the data is limited, say so instead of inventing hidden spots
expected_behavior: Recommend real, verified places only and explicitly avoid guessing when data is limited.

query: Quais são as melhores praias perto de Lisboa?
expected_facts: Use only beach or coastal-area options grounded in available Lisbon data, such as confirmed VisitLisboa beach entries
If the available beach data is limited, disclose that limitation instead of inventing richer coverage for Cascais, Estoril, Costa da Caparica, or other areas
Optional nearby beach-zone context is acceptable only when clearly labelled as general guidance, not as retrieved source detail

query: Can you book me a table at Ramiro?
expected_facts: Agent cannot book tables or perform transactional actions
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system cannot perform transactional actions like booking

query: I need to sort out some paperwork in Lisbon. What kinds of public services can you help me find?
expected_facts: Explain in user-facing terms what kinds of Lisbon public services can be searched
Give practical category examples, such as pharmacies, municipal services, parking, or paperwork-related services when available

query: I'm not sure what to do this week. What kinds of events can I look for in Lisbon?
expected_facts: Explain in user-facing terms what kinds of Lisbon events can be searched
Give practical event category examples, such as music, exhibitions, theatre, festivals, or family events when available

query: I'm planning my itinerary and want ideas. What kinds of places can I explore in Lisbon?
expected_facts: Explain in user-facing terms what kinds of Lisbon places can be explored
Give practical place category examples, such as museums, monuments, viewpoints, parks, or neighbourhoods when available

query: Plan a full museum day in Lisbon for tomorrow, starting in Rossio and using public transport.
expected_facts: Weather forecast for tomorrow
Museum recommendations for a full-day plan
Practical public-transport guidance from Rossio and between itinerary points when possible
Do not rely only on a generic transport status summary when the user asks for an itinerary using public transport

query: Quero visitar Belém amanhã. Como está o tempo e como vou do Rossio para Belém de transportes públicos?
expected_facts: Condições meteorológicas para amanhã
Sugestões de atrações em Belém

query: What outdoor events are happening tomorrow in Lisbon? Should I bring an umbrella?
expected_facts: Outdoor event suggestions for tomorrow, or a clear no-results message if none are currently available
Tomorrow's weather forecast and rain probability
Practical advice on whether bringing an umbrella makes sense

query: Hello!

Oferta breve de ajuda

query: Thanks for your help!
expected_facts: Acknowledgment of thanks
Offer to help further

query: What is the capital of Japan?
expected_facts: System is focused on Lisbon tourism and mobility
Cannot answer general knowledge questions unrelated to Lisbon
expected_behavior: Politely redirect user to Lisbon-related topics and explain system scope

query: Write me a Python script to sort a list.
expected_facts: System is a Lisbon and AML information assistant, not a code generator
expected_behavior: Decline the coding request and explain that the assistant is specialized for Lisbon and AML tourism, mobility, and local information

query: Como posso ir de Madrid a Barcelona?
expected_facts: System only covers the Lisbon Metropolitan Area
Cannot provide routing for Spanish cities
expected_behavior: Inform user that the system only covers AML (Lisbon Metropolitan Area)

query: Tell me a joke about Lisbon.
expected_facts: Response is Lisbon-themed and contextually appropriate
Response does not hallucinate transport or tourism facts
expected_behavior: Acceptable to respond with a light Lisbon-themed joke or fun cultural remark. A brief, friendly joke that fits the Lisbon context is good UX. A dry redirect to informational queries is also acceptable but not preferred.
